operational_knowledge_units.title: Tipper heartbeat can be checked through a web browser using the tipper IP
operational_knowledge_units.summary: For an unplanned restart scenario, the slide indicates that tipper heartbeat should be verified. It states that a user can connect via a web browser using a tipper IP and provides an example WebVisu URL.
observed_evidence: Text: 'Check to make sure the tippers are getting heartbeat.'
Text: 'You can connect via a web browser using a tipper ip.'
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Services unplanned restart diagnostic: check whether tippers are getting heartbeat. Heartbeat verification may be performed by connecting in a web browser to the tipper IP, for example using a WebVisu URL such as http://10.27.80.154:8080/webvisu.htm.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Check tipper heartbeat via browser during unplanned restart
preconditions: A tipper IP address is known.
The check is being performed in the context of an unplanned restart.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Services / Unplanned restart' instructs checking whether tippers are getting heartbeat and notes browser access using a tipper IP, with an example URL shown.

steps.instruction: Check to make sure the tippers are getting heartbeat.
steps.expected_outcome: You determine whether heartbeat is being received by the tippers.
steps.validation_check: Heartbeat status for the tipper can be observed or confirmed.

steps.instruction: Connect via a web browser using a tipper IP, for example by opening the shown WebVisu address pattern.
steps.expected_outcome: The browser connects to the tipper's web interface.
steps.validation_check: The tipper web page loads using the tipper IP and port/path shown on the slide example.
steps.visual_region_hint: Lower body text containing the example URL

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure candidate for unplanned restart: verify tipper heartbeat by connecting in a web browser to the tipper IP. Example shown: http://10.27.80.154:8080/webvisu.htm.
